SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nancy J. Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claim Appeals. Respondent Richard Wagner appears in Pro Per, Appellant Olivia Boston appears in Pro Per. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
9:52am
Mr. Wagner presents his case in the narrative.
10:00am
Ms. Boston present her case in the narrative
10:13am
Pattie Powers, previously, sworn testifies on behalf of the appellant.
10:17am
Judge Newman questions Ms. Boston
10:20am
Final statements by the parties, and case is submitted
